## Summary of Change
Describe what changed and where.

## Linked Issue
Link the issue this PR addresses (e.g. `Closes #123`).

## Why This Change Is Needed
Explain the problem this PR solves.

## Tests Added/Updated
List tests added or updated, or explain why no test changes were needed.

## Documentation Updated
List docs updated, or explain why no docs changes were needed.

## Risk / Impact
Describe potential risks, migration impact, or rollback considerations.

## Checklist
- [ ] Tests pass locally
- [ ] Lint/typecheck run if applicable
- [ ] Docs updated if required
- [ ] Change is minimal and scoped
